headline: 1 Legally Protected Financial Monopoly to Buy Hand Over Fist and Hold for the Next 30 Years
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) screens as a multi-decade compounder candidate because it operates a legally protected toll booth on global capital markets that almost every borrower, asset manager, and index fund is structurally required to pay. Recent price action is ugly: shares are down 23.08% year to date and trade at $400.16. For an investor in ... 1 Legally Protected Financial Monopoly to Buy Hand Over Fist and Hold for the Next 30 Years

headline: Canadian Oil Sands Greenhouse Gas Intensity Continues a 17-year Decline -- Down Nearly One-third Since 2009, S&P Global Energy Analysis Finds
summary: The greenhouse gas intensity of Canadian oil sands production has declined for a 13th straight year, according to a new analysis by S&P Global Energy. Since 2009, annual emissions intensity has declined every year but one (2012).

raw.headline: Canadian Oil Sands Greenhouse Gas Intensity Continues a 17-year Decline -- Down Nearly One-third Since 2009, S&P Global Energy Analysis Finds

headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Says US Business Growth Hit A Five Month High In June
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) reported that its latest US Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) survey shows private sector output surged in June. The data points to the fastest overall growth in five months, with manufacturing at a nearly four year high and services activity also expanding. S&P Global sits at the center of market intelligence, and its PMI surveys are closely watched as a quick read on business conditions. For June, the company is highlighting stronger activity across both...
